display_name: PUMP-DIP A/B (2026-07-06 decode _pump_dip_turn): dips INSIDE a pump (pc_h6>0) bounce 47.0% vs base-flush 46.9% = IDENTICAL quality, ~7x more numerous; fleet excluded them on DIRECTION alone. flush baseline + pump_dip_exempt (drops 4 pure-direction blocks: full-thesis pc_h6<=0 half, shallow-dip, pump-retrace, green-rip) + deep-h1 entry req removed. KEEPS full SELECTION funnel: buyer-size>=$34 (full-thesis buyer half kept), buyers>=12, wash<=0, recurring>=1, liq, net-flow turn, quote-asymmetry exit-depth, huge-wick/consec-red/btc enforced. THE throughput unlock (EV model: throughput is the only path to $100/day). Paper, own pool, loss-streak pause. A/B: does the selection edge hold on the 7x-larger set? vs badday_flush at n>=20. NOTE: flush age band 6h+ (young pump-dips = follow-up variant); blow-offs still filtered (decode said they bounce best — conservative miss, refine if lane wins).
